title: An Act to Require Antisemitism to Be Considered as Motivation When Determining a Violation of a Criminal or Civil Law
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 20, 2025
last_house_action: 3/28/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on March 28, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 5/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
